docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,696.16 FILED BY WATTS ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WATTS ANDREA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $765.00, DEFT WAIVES IRREGULARITIES IN SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY
